name: @junghanacs/pi-shell-acp
description_en: ACP bridge providing Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI backends to pi-coding-agent, with the entwurf orchestration surface for cross-session delegation.
description_zh: ACP 桥接，为 pi-coding-agent 提供 Claude Code、Codex 和 Gemini CLI 后端，具有用于跨会话委托的 entwurf 编排表面
